title: Creamy Celery Soup
description: A rich and comforting soup made with celery, bouillon, and a touch of cream.
instructions: Melt butter in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add chopped celery and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Pour in bouillon and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
Stir in heavy cream and nutmeg.
Use an immersion blender to puree the soup until smooth.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped celery if desired.
